devModeDescription: This lets you skip the passport scanning step and utilize simulated data.
unexpectedErrorDescription: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later. Help us fix this issue by sending a report.

home.scanIDFirst: Please scan your ID first to continue.

errorReportingConsent.title: Help improve ZKPassport
errorReportingConsent.description: Help us improve the app by sharing anonymous crash reports.
errorReportingConsent.disclaimer: These reports never include your identity or any personal details, only technical metadata.

nfcReading.holdPhone: Hold your phone against your ID.
nfcReading.paceFailed: PACE Authentication failed, switching to BAC
nfcReading.savingPassportDescription: Please wait a moment while your ID gets encrypted and saved locally to your device.

connectionLost.title: Connection lost
connectionLost.retag1: Place your phone back on your ID to continue
connectionLost.retag2: Keep your phone steady on the ID
connectionLost.retag3: Last attempt - hold phone firmly on ID
connectionLost.maxRetries: Could not reconnect. Please try again.

nfcReading.wrongTagRetag: Wrong tag detected. Place your phone on your ID.

IDSelectedCard.title: ID Selected
IDSelectedCard.infoText: Your ID info is stored locally on your phone.

AccessRequestHeader.devMode: Untrusted domain, continue at your own risk

LoadingOverlay.pleaseKeepPhoneAwake: Please keep your phone screen on during this process

0.description1: Scan a government-issued ID to privately store your identity.
0.description2: Verify in seconds without scanning your ID each time.

1.description1: Your ID is scanned and stored locally on your phone.
1.description2: Websites cannot correlate or track you between different services.

2.description1: The website does not learn who you are, only whether you meet their requirements.
2.description2: The checks run on your device, not on a central server.

standard.title: Standard Privacy Mode
standard.description: This mode keeps your identity private from the website, but the identifier could be recreated by someone who already has your ID data, such as the issuing authority. It offers strong privacy, but not the highest level.

features.notVisibleToWebsite: Not visible to the website or ZKPassport
features.couldBeRecreated: Could be recreated by someone with your ID data
features.lowerPrivacy: Lower privacy compared to Maximum Privacy mode

descriptions.notVisibleToWebsite: The website does not learn who you are, only whether you meet their requirements.
descriptions.notLinkableAcrossWebsites: Websites cannot correlate or track you between different services.
descriptions.couldBeRecreated: The issuing authority or anyone with your ID information could, in theory, compute the same identifier and recognise you.
descriptions.lowerPrivacy: It protects you from websites, but not necessarily from whoever issued your ID.

full.title: Maximum Privacy Mode
full.description: This mode gives you the strongest privacy. The identifier used cannot be recreated or linked back to you by anyone, not the website, not ZKPassport, and not the issuing authority.

features.cannotBeRecreated: Cannot be recreated from ID data

descriptions.notLinkableByAnyone: Nobody, not the website, not ZKPassport, not the issuing government can link this proof back to you.
descriptions.notLinkableAcrossWebsites: Neither the website, ZKPassport, or the issuing government can link this proof back to you.
descriptions.cannotBeRecreated: Even someone who already has your ID details cannot generate this identifier.
descriptions.yourIdentityRemainsFullyPrivate: Only the fact that you meet the website's requirement is revealed. Nothing else.

UnableToContinue.title: Unable to continue
UnableToContinue.description: You cannot continue because you do not meet the requirements. Your data will remain on your phone and will not be shared.

VerificationCriteriaList.title: Requested Information
VerificationCriteriaList.subtitle: This website asked to verify the following information:

accessRequest.title: A website is requesting access to your information
accessRequest.keepPhoneAwake: Please keep your phone screen on during this process
accessRequest.doneDescription: You can now return to the website.
accessRequest.domainNotVerified: We are not able to verify the domain of the website. You may be encountering a connection issue or the website is not trustworthy.
accessRequest.domainVerifying: We're currently verifying the domain of the website is the correct one. Please wait a few seconds.
accessRequest.purposeTooltip: Why the service needs your information and how it will be used.
accessRequest.criteriaNotMet: Your ID does not meet this requirement
accessRequest.criteriaNotMetDescription: Some of the criteria are not met by your ID

accessItemLabel.no: You <bold>do not</bold> meet the website's criteria

birthdate.disclose: What is your date of birth?
birthdate.gte: Were you born on or after {{date}}?
birthdate.lte: Were you born on or before {{date}}?

issuing_country.disclose: What is the country that issued your ID?
issuing_country.in: Was your ID issued by one of {{countries}} countries?
issuing_country.out: Was your ID not issued by one of the following countries?

nationality.in: Are you a citizen of one of the following countries?
nationality.out: Are you not a citizen of one of the following countries?

expiry_date.disclose: What is the expiry date of your ID?
expiry_date.range: Is your ID valid between {{min}} and {{max}}?
expiry_date.gte: Is your ID valid on or after {{date}}?
expiry_date.lte: Is your ID valid until at least {{date}}?

age.range: Are you between {{min}} and {{max}} years old?
age.gt: Are you older than {{age}} years old?
age.gte: Are you {{age}} years old or older?
age.lt: Are you younger than {{age}} years old?
age.lte: Are you {{age}} years old or younger?

document_type.disclose: What type of ID do you have?

bind.user_address: Bind your wallet to this verification

sanctions.question: Are you listed on any sanctions lists from the selected countries or authorities?

accessItemLabel.facematch: Are you the person on your ID?

document_number.eq: Your document number will be revealed.
document_number.disclose: Your document number will be revealed.

document_type.eq: Your document type will be revealed (Passport, National ID, or Residence Permit).
document_type.eq_past: Your document type was revealed (Passport, National ID, or Residence Permit).
document_type.disclose: Your document type will be revealed (Passport, National ID, or Residence Permit).
document_type.disclose_past: Your document type was revealed (Passport, National ID, or Residence Permit).

fullname.eq: Your full official name will be revealed.
fullname.eq_past: Your full official name was revealed
fullname.disclose: Your full official name will be revealed.
fullname.disclose_past: Your full official name was revealed

firstname.eq: Your first name will be revealed.
firstname.disclose: Only your first name will be revealed (not including your middle name or secondary given names).
firstname.disclose_past: Only your first name was revealed (not including your middle name or secondary given names)

lastname.eq: Your last name will be revealed.
lastname.disclose: Only your last name will be revealed (not including your first or middle names).
lastname.disclose_past: Only your last name was revealed (not including your first or middle names)

bind.user_address: Your wallet address will be linked to this proof.
bind.user_address_past: Your wallet address was linked to this proof.
bind.chain: The verification will be tied to this blockchain.
bind.chain_past: The verification was tied to this blockchain.

bind.custom_data_past: The verification included the following data: {{data}}.

sanctions.bool: Only <bold>Yes</bold> will be revealed, no personal or list-matching data is shared.
sanctions.bool_past: Only <bold>Yes</bold> was revealed, no personal or list-matching data was shared.

Only <bold>Yes</bold> will be revealed, no personal or list-matching data is shared.

accessItemDescription.facematch: Private FaceMatch performs a liveness check and compares your face against the photo on your ID.
accessItemDescription.facematch_past: Private FaceMatch performed a liveness check and compared your face against the photo on your ID.

title.deleteId: The selected ID was deleted successfully
title.deleteWrong: Oops! Something went wrong, try again later

description.success: We've read your ID details correctly. You can now continue with the verification.
description.nfcFailed: We detected the chip in your document, but couldn't complete the scan. The chip may be damaged or not responding correctly.
description.notSupported: This document isn't supported yet due to missing information from the issuing authority. We've saved it in the app anyway, keep an eye on the app for updates.
description.notSupportedIntent: It's not possible to generate a verification proof because the issuing authority's certificate isn't currently supported.
description.expiredId: Your ID has expired, so you can't generate a verification. Please scan an up-to-date ID to continue with the verification process.
description.somethingWrong: The app couldn't continue because the connection was interrupted.
description.deleteId: The selected ID was deleted successfully
description.deleteWrong: Oops! Something went wrong, try again later
description.verified: Your information met all the required criteria. The verification was successful.
description.notSuccessful: You didn't meet the verification requirements, so you won't be able to proceed. This may limit access to certain content, features, or services.
description.chipNotDetected: We couldn't detect the chip in your document. It may be damaged or unreadable.
description.docNotSupported: This ID doesn't contain an NFC chip, so it can't be used with this app.

secondaryText.lostConnection: Please <bold>check your connection</bold> and try again.
secondaryText.useAnotherID: Please use another ID if available
secondaryText.contactServiceProvider: If you believe this is an error, please contact the service provider for support.

WhyScanId.title: Why scan your ID?
WhyScanId.description: Scanning your ID lets ZKPassport confirm it's genuine, so you can prove facts about yourself without ever exposing personal details.
WhyScanId.subtitle: Here's how it works:

1.text: Your ID data stays encrypted on your device

2.text: You use Face ID/Touch ID to protect it

3.text: You can prove facts about yourself (like being 18+), without showing your ID details

infoFrame.text: You'll only need to do this once <bold>and your data will stay secure and private.</bold>

facematch.title: Keep your face in the frame
facematch.titleNoFaceDetected: Position your face in the frame
facematch.nofaceDetected: First, position your face in the camera. Then move your head in a circle to show all the angles of your face.
facematch.instruction_center: Look straight ahead at the camera
facematch.look_left: Move your head slowly <bold>to the left</bold>
facematch.look_right: Move your head slowly <bold>to the right</bold>
facematch.permissionText: We need camera permission to verify your face
facematch.facialDataSecure: Your facial data stays securely on your device.

timeout.title: Private FaceMatch timed out
timeout.description:
We couldn't confirm that your face matches the ID used for this verification.

Please try again and <bold>make sure the person scanning is the same shown on the ID</bold>.

history.title: Verification History
history.noVerificationDescription: Next time you go through a verification, it will appear here in your history.

description.passport: Make sure your Passport has the <bold>NFC symbol</bold>, typically <bold>on the front cover</bold>.
description.idCard: Make sure your ID has the <bold>NFC symbol</bold>, usually on the <bold>front or back of the card</bold>.
description.residencePermit: Make sure your Residence Permit has the <bold>NFC symbol</bold>, usually on the <bold>front or back of the card</bold>.

deleteID.title: Delete ID?
deleteID.description: Deleting this ID will remove it from your device along with all associated verifications. This action can't be undone.
deleteID.successDescription: The selected ID was deleted successfully.
deleteID.errorDescription: Oops! Something went wrong, try again later

incompatibleSdk.title: Incompatible SDK Version
incompatibleSdk.description: The service you are trying to connect to is using SDK version {{sdkVersion}} while this app supports version {{minVersion}} to {{maxVersion}}. The service needs to update to a supported version.
incompatibleSdk.disclaimer: You can contact the service's support team and ask them to upgrade their integration

certificateMissing.title: Certificate Missing
certificateMissing.description: Our certificate registry does not currently support this ID. You can help us add support for this ID by sending a report. No sensitive data will be sent.

unsupportedId.title: Unsupported ID
unsupportedId.description: Unfortunately your ID uses a signing algorithm that we don't support yet.

errorReport.title: Error Report Has Been Sent
errorReport.description: Thank you for helping us improve the app. We'll use this information to fix the issue.

privacyWarning.title: Privacy Warning
privacyWarning.description: A screenshot was detected. If someone asked you to send a photo of your ID details, do not do it.

passportView.name: Name
passportView.unsupportedMessage: This ID can't be used for verification yet because the country's certificate is not available.
passportView.expiredMessage: This ID is expired and can't be used for verification.

passport.title: Passport
passport.description: Government-issued booklet for international identity proof

idCard.title: National ID
idCard.description: Card used for national ID checks or specific regions

residencePermit.title: Residence Permit
residencePermit.description: Document/card that verifies a foreign national's residence

prepareID.title: Scan the chip
prepareID.passport: Open your passport and lay it flat on a surface. When you're ready press [Start scan] and slowly move your phone over your passport as shown above.
prepareID.idCard: Lay your ID face up on a flat surface. When you're ready press [Start scan] and slowly move your phone over your ID as shown above.
prepareID.residencePermit: Lay your ID face up on a flat surface. When you're ready press [Start scan] and slowly move your phone over your ID as shown above.

passport.name: Passport
passport.description: Open your Passport to the photo page and place it face up on a flat surface.

idCard.name: National ID
idCard.description: Place the back of your National ID on a flat surface with good lighting.

residencePermit.name: Residence Permit
residencePermit.description: Place the back of your Residence Permit on a flat surface with good lighting.

scanning.editMRZSubtitle: Review if your details are correct. To edit them simply click on the field.

errors.dobFuture: Date of birth cannot be in the future
errors.expiryPast: Expiry date must be in the future

attempt1.title: Incomplete Scan
attempt1.description: We didn't get all the details yet. Keep your phone steady after the vibration to finish the scan.

attempt2.title: Still couldn't complete scan
attempt2.description: <bold>Try removing your phone case</bold> and keep the phone steady once you feel a vibration.

attempt3.title: Still couldn't complete scan
attempt3.description: Make sure your passport is valid and the NFC chip is undamaged.

attempt1.title: Couldn't detect the chip
attempt1.description: <bold>Try removing your phone case</bold>, and stop moving your phone once you feel a vibration.

attempt2.title: Still couldn't detect the chip
attempt2.description: Make sure your passport is valid and the NFC chip is undamaged.

attempt3.title: Couldn't detect the chip
attempt3.description: Make sure your passport has the NFC symbol.

duplicate.title: ID already scanned
duplicate.description: This ID is already linked to your account. To continue, scan a different valid ID or use the one already linked.

mrzTimeout.title: Code not detected
mrzTimeout.description: Please make sure your ID has the code and that it is fully visible.

nfcDisabled.title: Turn on NFC to continue
nfcDisabled.description: To scan the chip inside your ID, you need to enable NFC in your device settings.
nfcDisabled.disclaimer: Click the button below or go to Settings > Connections > NFC and switch it on, then return to the app.

nfcReady.title: You're ready to continue!
nfcReady.description: Place your phone flat against your document to start the scan.

mrzScanFailed.title: MRZ Scan Failed
mrzScanFailed.description: There was an issue reading your document's MRZ data.

nfcSystemFailure.title: NFC isn't working on your device
nfcSystemFailure.description:
Your phone NFC reader has stopped responding, so the app cannot continue with the scan.

If the problem persists, <bold>please restart your device and try again.</bold>

wifiInterference.title: Connection unstable
wifiInterference.description:
We're having trouble maintaining a stable connection to your ID chip. This can sometimes be caused by WiFi interference.

<bold>Try turning off WiFi</bold> in your device settings and scan again.

scanning.howToCheck: How to check for the NFC symbol?

position_qr_code: Position the QR code inside the frame
camera_permission_denied: Camera access is required to scan QR codes. Please enable it in your device settings to continue.

developerOptions.title: Developer Options
developerOptions.enableDevModeDescription: This lets you skip the passport scanning step and utilize simulated data.

1.title: Start a verification
1.description: When a website asks for proof (e.g. age, nationality, name), simply scan the QR code or click the button to begin.

2.title: Review and approve
2.description: See exactly what the website is asking, then confirm to share only what's needed.

3.title: Try the demo:
3.description: If you want to try it out now, check our demo.

security.title: Security
security.requireAuthDescription: <bold>When verifying</bold> you'll need to authenticate with your password, face ID, or fingerprint before verifying.

technicalInfo.submitMetadataDescription: This will submit anonymous technical information about your ID to help improve the service. No personal information will be included.

debugInfo.title: Debug Information
debugInfo.imageCopied: The image has been copied to your clipboard
debugInfo.somethingWrongWithImage: Something is wrong with the format of the image. Its raw base64 string was copied instead.
debugInfo.success: Your metadata has been successfully submitted. Thank you for helping us improve the app!
debugInfo.error: There was an error submitting your metadata. Please try again later.
debugInfo.noCscFound: No CSC found for this passport
debugInfo.signerInfoWarning: Signer information contains more technical details about your ID's signature.
debugInfo.metadataDescription: This will submit anonymous technical information about your ID to help improve the service. No personal information will be included.
debugInfo.errorReportingDescription: Send success and failure reports to help improve the app

options.title: Options
options.eventReportingDescription: Help us improve the app by sharing anonymous crash reports. These reports never include your identity or any personal details, only technical metadata.
options.clearCacheDescription: Clearing the cache will help free up storage space and fix problems caused by outdated cached files.
options.clearCacheErrorDescription: Oops! Something went wrong, try again later

permissions.cameraMessage: We need access to your camera to scan QR codes and the MRZ on your ID. Please enable camera access in your device settings.
permissions.biometricNotAvailable: Biometric authentication is not available on this device.
permissions.biometricNotEnrolled: Please set up biometric authentication (such as Face ID or Touch ID) in your device settings to protect your ID data.
permissions.biometricWarning: Your device supports biometric authentication but you did not enable it. You can continue using the app without biometric authentication, but we recommend you to enable it for better security.

screenshot.privacyWarningMessage: A screenshot was detected. If someone asked you to send a photo of your ID details, do not do it.

errors.oldUnsupportedZKRPassportDescription: Your test data is outdated and no longer supported. Please reload the mock passports.
errors.cscNotFoundDescription: Our certificate registry does not currently support this ID. You can help us add support for this ID by sending a report. No sensitive data will be sent.
errors.unsupportedPassportDescription: Unfortunately your ID uses a signing algorithm that we don't support yet.

facematch.appAttestNotSupported: App attestation is not supported on this device

errorMessage: An unexpected error occurred. The app needs to restart.
memoryWarning: Your device may not have enough memory to generate proofs. This could cause the app to crash. Would you like to continue anyway?
